caption: A person's hand holds a silver and green Sharpie marker over a collection of trading card boxes. The setting is an indoor space featuring a black surface adorned with a large red, white, and black logo that reads "CASPYS CASEBREAKS". Stacked in the background are multiple boxes of trading cards with "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" printed in white and green text. A small inset video in the lower right corner of each frame shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt sitting in a chair. In the top frames, the hand moves the marker slightly to the right. In the bottom frames, the marker is removed from view, and the hand is no longer visible. Additionally, a small logo in the center-right of the frames contains the text "CASEBREAKS.com".
